title: Tag names: strip # prefix in Mastodon API responses
description: AP tag objects use name: #rust but the Mastodon REST API must use name: rust (no #). Conflating them causes clients to render ##rust. Check Broadside's tag serialization in API responses vs AP objects.
close_reason: N/A: Broadside has no Mastodon REST API yet. AP tag serialization correctly uses # prefix. If Mastodon API is added, must strip # in API tag objects.
